description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This brown handbag is a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Wear this with boho-ethnic ensembles. Height: 26 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 15 cm Ruched fabric styling on the upper with leatherette base and handles Two handles and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and pouch Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
